name: app-shell
description: Branded application shell pieces built on the shadcn sidebar: SidebarNav (searchable navigation with inline collapsible sub-items and optional two-tier stacked panels that drill in/out like the Vercel dashboard Settings), AppSidebarHeader (workspace switcher), AppSidebarFooter (user menu) and AppHeader (top bar with sidebar trigger). Compose with SidebarProvider, Sidebar and SidebarInset for a sidebar-07 style layout.
